## Inputs

| Name                                                                                    | Description        | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Default | Required |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | :------: |
| <a name="input_availability_zones"></a> [availability_zones](#input_availability_zones) | 가용 영역 설정     | `list(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ec2_instance"></a> [ec2_instance](#input_ec2_instance)                   | EC2 생성 정보 입력 | <pre>map(object({<br/> create_yn = string<br/> ami_type = string # 기존 AMI or 신규 생성 EC2 여부 지정<br/> instance_type = string<br/> subnet_type = string<br/> availability_zones = string<br/> associate_public_ip_address = bool<br/> disable_api_termination = bool<br/> instance_name = string<br/> security_group_name = string<br/> env = string<br/> script_file_name = optional(string)<br/> iam_instance_profile = optional(string)<br/> key_pair_name = string<br/> private_ip = optional(string)<br/><br/> root_block_device = object({<br/> volume_type = optional(string)<br/> volume_size = optional(number)<br/> delete_on_termination = optional(bool)<br/> encrypted = optional(bool)<br/> })<br/><br/> owners = string<br/> filter = list(object({<br/> name = optional(string)<br/> values = optional(list(string))<br/> }))<br/> }))</pre> | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ec2_key_pair"></a> [ec2_key_pair](#input_ec2_key_pair)                   | EC2 key pair       | <pre>map(object({<br/> name = string<br/> env = string<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ec2_security_group"></a> [ec2_security_group](#input_ec2_security_group) | EC2 보안그룹 생성  | <pre>map(object({<br/> security_group_name = optional(string)<br/> description = optional(string)<br/> env = optional(string)<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_ec2_sg_rules"></a> [ec2_sg_rules](#input_ec2_sg_rules)                   | EC2 보안그룹 규칙  | <pre>map(object({<br/> type = string<br/> description = string<br/> security_group_key = string<br/> from_port = number<br/> to_port = number<br/> ip_protocol = string<br/> cidr_ipv4 = optional(list(string))<br/> referenced_security_group_id = optional(list(string))<br/> }))</pre>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_env"></a> [env](#input_env)                                              | AWS 개발 환경 설정 | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | n/a     |   yes    |
| <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input_tags)                                           | 공통 태그 설정     | `map(string)`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | n/a     |   yes    |

## Outputs

No outputs.
